name: Potential Botnet Infected Host Detected
description: This prompt is designed to help investigate a host that has been flagged as potentially infected with a botnet. The detection is based on a security appliance (like an IDS/IPS or firewall) detecting traffic patterns or signatures associated with botnet Command and Control (C2) communications. The prompt is used to analyze the source and destination of the traffic, and the host involved to determine the severity and scope of the infection.

prompts.prompt: Investigate the security event labeled 'Botnet' at `{timestamp}`. The host `{host}` was flagged as potentially infected with a botnet. The event was triggered by a detection from a security appliance. Analyze the source address `{source_address}` and destination address `{destination_address}` to identify any known malicious IPs or domains. Review the associated alert details to understand the nature of the botnet activity. Provide a summary of the event, the potential impact, and recommend immediate isolation and remediation steps.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The time the botnet activity was detected.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname of the potentially infected host.

parameters.name: source_address
parameters.description: The source IP address of the suspicious network traffic.

parameters.name: destination_address
parameters.description: The destination IP address of the suspicious network traffic.
